headline: Data Center Networking Technology Global Markets Report 2025-2030, Profiles of Leading Players - Cisco Systems, Dell, Broadcom, Arista Networks, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise
summary: The data center networking market presents opportunities due to rising demand for digital infrastructure and AI/ML solutions across sectors. Key growth drivers include high-performance technologies like SmartNICs and DPUs for scalable, energy-efficient networks, particularly in colocation and hyperscale data centers globally. headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise AI Push Puts Valuation And Growth In Focus
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise launched AI focused networking and compute solutions at Mobile World Congress 2026. The new offerings expand HPE's AI infrastructure portfolio for service providers with integrated Juniper Networks technology. The company also highlighted new automation, security capabilities and tailored financing programs to support adoption.
